response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship, testing discipline, and breadth across web, mobile, and embedded work, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8–12 years of hands-on C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT/REST IoT, and IEC 62443 secure development experience. The resume shows only a brief ~6-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago; primary stacks are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850).
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring
Broad polyglot background including low-latency, async, high-throughput systems in DLang
Architecture and full-stack delivery experience across distributed and event-driven systems
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — only one short role over 10 years ago
No demonstrated industrial automation, IEC 62443, or SDL background
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0) or MQTT-based IoT

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering craftsmanship and architecture skills
